hooks.command: bash -c 'scripts/pre-hook.sh; echo "--- Git sync ---"; git pull --rebase 2>&1 && echo "✅ Up to date" || echo "⚠️  Pull failed or conflicts — resolve before working"'

echo 'CRITICAL — PRESERVE IN COMPACTION SUMMARY: (1) current task goal in one sentence, (2) exact list of all files modified this session, (3) schema.sql status — changed or not, (4) hash formula in use, (5) sync_status values involved, (6) unresolved FK/SCD2 decisions, (7) last pgedge query result if relevant, (8) exact next step after context reset'
